name: billing
description: Track Copilot CLI token consumption, model usage, and premium request spend — per session and aggregated over time. Reads session.shutdown events from session-state. Copilot CLI only.

_meta.notes: Copilot CLI only. Reads ~/.copilot/session-state/*/events.jsonl via session.shutdown events. Requires jq. No Gemini/Pi/Claude support.
